creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text: Unfortunately version 1.10 has been killed in https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/78d03534d7899a27f3a74cb078ccc192a61113ff not taking into account that both 1.9 and 1.10 are LTS releases while 1.11 will only live for 6 months. Please readd 1.10 just like 1.9 is right now selectable via WITH_SUBVERSION_VER.
